title: Krater
notes: When you start the game it tries to get HTML information from a server but fails. Just press ok to close the news window and the game works well.

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 580 Series (POLARIS10, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.9-92.current, LLVM 6.0.1)
title: Krater

notes: Runs buttery smooth at 1080P, Extreme settings.  Struggles hard in 4K at Low settings.  No graphical artifacts, seemingly indistinguishable from native Windows.
